content: Phase C.1 — explored MLB Stats API helpers
Phase C.2 — baseball_historical.py: compute + enrich + bulk prefetch with MLB Stats API + API-Sports fallback
Phase C.3 — baseball_trap_signals.py (7 traps: bullpen, cold offense, pitcher inflation, F5 mismatch, extra-innings, weather-blind, prior-series-inflation)
Phase C.4 — baseball_runs_rescue.py (Total Runs Over/Under, F5 Total Runs, Run Line +1.5, Team Total Under)
Phase C.5 — analyst_engine.py Phase 10c prefetch + Phase 12c annotation
Phase C.6 — alternative_rescue.py wire baseball_runs_rescue + trap signal enrichment
Phase C.7 — HistoricalProfilePanel.jsx extended for baseball (pitching block, F5, bullpen fatigue label)
Phase C.8 — integration smoke test: 5 trap signals firing + Total Runs Under recommendation + 3 alt markets
